test.name: Realizar Primeiro Cadastro

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Usuario Robot' into text field 'xpath=//input[@name='name']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (921, 590) (Session info: chrome=148.0.7778.167); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc941e35+2e8d45] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc66e6c0+155d0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc3bd57d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc41f205] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc41ce1a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc41a167] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc419017] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc40bc46] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc43fe6a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc40b4c6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc464c63] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc409d58] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc40ac43] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc96dab9+3149c9] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc96802b+30ef3b] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc98c872+333782] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc68b785+32695] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc6942bc+3b1cc] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc677f24+1ee34] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc6780b4+1efc4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc65bf27+2e37] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7fff8edee957+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7fff9002427c+2c]
kw.status: ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (921, 590) (Session info: chrome=148.0.7778.167); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc941e35+2e8d45] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc66e6c0+155d0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc3bd57d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc41f205] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc41ce1a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc41a167] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc419017] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc40bc46] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc43fe6a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc40b4c6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc464c63] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc409d58] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc40ac43] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc96dab9+3149c9] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc96802b+30ef3b] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc98c872+333782] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc68b785+32695] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc6942bc+3b1cc] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc677f24+1ee34] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc6780b4+1efc4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc65bf27+2e37] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7fff8edee957+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7fff9002427c+2c]

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.status: ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (921, 590) (Session info: chrome=148.0.7778.167); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc941e35+2e8d45] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc66e6c0+155d0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc3bd57d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc41f205] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc41ce1a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc41a167] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc419017] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc40bc46] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc43fe6a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc40b4c6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc464c63] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc409d58] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6fc40ac43] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc96dab9+3149c9] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc96802b+30ef3b] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc98c872+333782] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc68b785+32695] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc6942bc+3b1cc] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc677f24+1ee34] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc6780b4+1efc4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6fc65bf27+2e37] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7fff8edee957+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7fff9002427c+2c]
